objective: Refresh the durable handoff artifacts after LM Studio server, load, and import diagnostics so the next session starts from the current blocker rather than stale benchmark milestones.

details: Recorded latest committed milestones through M60.

Preserved no-promotion constraints and the requirement that `scripts/lmstudio_vlm_live_validation_preflight.py` must report `ready_for_live_validation=true` before live LM Studio inference validation.
Kept LM Studio internal model indexes and cache files untouched.

blocker.summary: Retained LFM2.5-VL is present on disk and in LM Studio model-data, but is not exposed by `lms ls --json`; server start, `lms load --estimate-only`, and `lms import --dry-run` did not unblock visibility.

decision.next_action: Rerun the live-validation preflight only after LM Studio model registration changes; otherwise continue with isolated local no-promotion hypotheses.
